description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior is predominantly white with large windows, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The house features a main entryway with a small set of steps leading to a covered porch, and a separate garage structure is visible to one side. The property is surrounded by a manicured lawn and several trees, adding greenery and privacy. A paved walkway leads from the street to the front door, and there is a patio area with a pergola on one side of the house. The overall layout is open and inviting, with a focus on outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern two-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, a separate garage, and landscaped surroundings. Features include a covered entryway, patio with pergola, and a manicured lawn with trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, garage to the left, and a clear view of the lawn and walkway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the patio with pergola and the main house structure, with trees framing the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, more windows, and the garage structure to the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, entry steps, and the arrangement of trees and lawn.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, covered porch, and minimalist door design
